description: The AvatarRawToolData component is used to read controller data associated with RawDataTools from.

fields.ControllerSide: The side to read data from the user's controller for.
fields.PressingPrimary: Whether the user is pressing Primary
fields.PressingSecondary: Whether the user is pressing Secondary.
fields.PressingGrab: Whether the user is pressing the grab button
fields.PrimaryStrength: The strength the user is pressing Primary.
fields.SecondaryAxis: What direction the user is moving their secondary button joystick
fields._activeUser: The user this is reading data and getting streams from.
fields._strengthStream: The stream to get ``PrimaryStrength``'s value from
fields._axisStream: The stream to get ``SecondaryAxis``'s value from.
fields._primaryStream: The stream to get ``PressingPrimary``'s value from.
fields._secondaryStream: The stream to get ``PressingSecondary``'s value from.
fields._grabStream: The stream to get ``PressingGrab``'s value from.
